_comment: Universal rules loaded for every project. Cannot be disabled by project config.

rules.message: Remove .js extension from imports. bundler moduleResolution resolves .ts directly.
Never use eval(). It enables code injection attacks. Use JSON.parse(), Function constructor with validation, or structured alternatives.
dangerouslySetInnerHTML risks XSS. Sanitize with DOMPurify or use a markdown renderer. Never pass user input directly.
Possible hardcoded API key/secret detected. Use environment variables instead.
Prototype pollution vector detected. __proto__ and constructor.prototype manipulation enables RCE (CVE-2025-55182 class). Use Object.create(null) or Map for user-controlled data.
SQL template literal with interpolation detected — SQL injection risk. Use parameterized queries (supabase.from().select(), pg prepared statements) instead.
Direct innerHTML assignment enables XSS (2.74x more common in AI code — CodeRabbit 2025). Use textContent, React JSX, or DOMPurify.sanitize().
URL with embedded credentials detected. Use environment variables for auth, never hardcode user:pass in URLs.
Logging potentially sensitive data (password/token/secret). Remove before production or use structured logging with redaction.
Empty catch block silently swallows errors (1.88x more common in AI code). At minimum, log the error or re-throw.
